ForbiddenComment:PipelineWiring.kt$PipelineWiring$* Registers [StageExecutor] implementations for every [PipelineStage]. * * Stages map to the 10-step algorithm from diploma section 2.1.1: * 1. Session init (auth, NLP, resources) * 2. Data collection (topic posts, author registry, author data + comments) * 3. Preprocessing (text cleaning, lemmatization) * 4. Topic filtering (two-pass + dedup) * 5. Scoring (11 quantitative scores) — TODO: stage 5 * 6. Bootstrap (one-level + two-level) — TODO: stage 6 * 7. Composite scores + role assignment — TODO: stage 7 * 8. Quality indicators — TODO: stage 8 * 9. Export * 10. Publish to UI
ForbiddenComment:PipelineWiring.kt$PipelineWiring$// TODO: Implement on instruction stage 8 (analysis/sufficiency/ + analysis/quality/)
